resources.string: To ensure your property safe, your current coin and diamond balance must be 0
To ensure your property safe, your back pack balance must be emptied of gifts.
You have been kicked out of the room
To ensure that the agency can operate properly you need to contact the staff to transfer your agency.
To ensure that the agency can operate properly ,you need to transfer your agency to another user
Local ticket for auto login expired. userSig is required for manual login.
The user status not supported. Please enable the ability in the console first.
Failed to download the file via FTP. Check whether your network is connected or the file or audio has expired.
Failed to get the server list via FTP.
Failed to upload the file via FTP. Check your network connection.
Failed to upload the file via FTP. Check if the uploaded image can be opened normally.
proxy_manager request parameter is invalid in local check.
proxy_manager failed to sync SVR data
group assistant request field contains non-preset fields.
Local storage of group assistant group data is disabled.
Failed to load groupinfo from storage
Logged out before login (returned at login time)
Account verification failed (user info get failed)
Log in to the same account on other devices
Response parsing failed when OPENSTATSVC reports status to OPENMSG during login.
Timeout occurred when OPENSTATSVC attempted to report status to OPENMSG during login.
Returned at login time. Ticket expired.
TSL response packet is verified at login time. Packet length error.
TLS decryption failed at login time.
Failed to connect network when the app is lunched.
Not logged in to the user\'s account.
Not logged in to IM SDK
No permission when sending request packet
No network connection when sending request packet, which is converted to case ERR_REQ_NO_NET_ON_REQ:
No network connection when sending response packet, which is converted to case ERR_REQ_NO_NET_ON_RSP:
Unknown error occurred while sending packet
No available SSO for short connections.
Message content is filtered due to security reasons.
No network connection when sending request
No network connection when sending response
No network connection when sending request. Try again once network connection is restored.
No network connection when sending response. Try again once network connection is restored.
The friend list field is invalid. It is required with each list name of 30 bytes at most.
The remark field exceeds the limit of 96 bytes.
The source field in the friend request is invalid, which should be prefixed with \"AddSource_Type_\".
The description field in the friend request is invalid, which should not exceed 120 bytes.
Group profile photo URL is invalid, which should not exceed 100 bytes.
Invalid group ID. Custom group ID must be printable ASCII characters (0x20-0x7e), with maximum length of 48 bytes, and cannot be prefixed with @TGS#.
Group description is invalid, which cannot exceed 240 bytes.
Group name is invalid, which cannot exceed 30 bytes.
Group card is invalid, which cannot exceed 50 bytes.
Group notice is invalid, which cannot exceed 300 bytes.
The number of members to be invited cannot be 0.
Request to join private groups is not allowed.
The maximum number of group members is exceeded.
SDK has been initialized. Do not initialize again.
Network connection denied. Too many attempts. Service denied by the server.
Network connection timed out. Try again once network connection is restored.
Network is connected to an intermediate node or connection to the server is reset.
Network disconnected. No connection is established, or no network is detected when a socket connection is established.
Call frequency is limited, with up to 5 requests per second.
No available route to the network. Try again once network connection is restored.
The request packet length is greater than the limit, the maximum supported is 1MB.

The request packet has entered the queue to be sent, and part of the data has been sent. A timeout occurs while waiting for the remaining part to be sent. The uplink bandwidth may be insufficient. Please check whether the network is smooth. When calling back the error code, it is detected that there is no Internet connection.
Call failed to due to insufficient buffer resources in the system. System busy. Internal error.

The request packet has entered the network buffer of the system, and the wait for the return packet from the server has timed out. The request packet may not have left the terminal device, the intermediate route has discarded it, the server has accidentally lost the packet, or the return packet has been discarded by the system network layer. There is no error code detected when calling back. networking.
Request packet has entered the network buffer of the system. Timed out waiting for response from server.
Timed out waiting for request packet to enter the to-be-sent queue.
Request packet has entered the to-be-sent queue. Timed out waiting to enter the network buffer of the system.

The request packet length is greater than the limit, the maximum supported is 1MB. The request packet has entered the queue to be sent. The network buffer waiting to enter the system has timed out. There are too many data packets or the sending thread cannot process them. When the error code is called back, it is detected that there is no Internet connection.
The number of Server connections exceeds the limit. Service denied by the server.

The request packet has entered the queue to be sent, and part of the data has been sent. A timeout occurs while waiting for the remaining part to be sent. The uplink bandwidth may be insufficient. Please check whether the network is smooth. When the callback error occurs, it is detected that there is an Internet connection. Internal error
Request queue is full. The number of concurrent requests exceeds the limit of 1000.
The bill failed verification or was hit by security. Please call timmanager again getInstance(). The login interface generates a new ticket.

Ticket expired. Ticket is an internal bill generated according to usersig. The validity period of ticket is less than or equal to that of usersig. Please call timmanager again getInstance(). The login interface generates a new ticket.
The request requires app admin permissions.
The account is added to the blocked list.
The number of accounts created exceeds that allowed in the free trial version. Upgrade to the professional version.
Restricted due to too many failures and retries. Check if the UserSig is correct and try again after one minute.
Invalid batch quantity in the request.
UserSig has expired. Generate a new one and try again.
Your sdk version is too low, Please upgrade to the latest version.
UserSig has expired. Generate a new one.
The requested Identifier does not match the Identifier that is used to generate the UserSig.
Failed to verify UserSig with public key
The requested SDKAppID does not match the SDKAppID of the generated UserSig.
Public key does not exist when verifying UserSig.
SDKAppID not found. Check the app information in the IM console.
JSON parsing error in the HTTP request. Check the JSON format.
The sending message package is too long. Currently, the maximum 12K message package length is supported. Please reduce the package size and try again.
Fill in the Identifier field of the REST API request with the app admin\'s account.
The Identifier or UserSig in the request URI or JSON packet is incorrect.
HTTP parsing error. Check the HTTP request URL format.
The Identifier type of the request packet body is incorrect. Confirm that the Identifier is a string.
Requested resource error. Check the request URL.
Invalid SDKAppID. Check the SDKAppID validity.

The package has not been purchased, or the package has expired, or the purchased package is being configured and has not yet taken effect. Please log in to the im purchase page to re purchase the package. After purchase, it will take effect in 5 minutes.
Too many requests. Try again later.
The service request timed out or the HTTP request format is incorrect. Check the error and try again.
The REST API call frequency exceeds the limit. Reduce the request rate.
JSON parsing error in the HTTP response packet.
SDKAppID request rate exceeds the limit. Reduce the request rate.
SDKAppID is required for the REST API. Check the SDKAppID in the request URL.
Text is filtered due to security reasons, which may contain sensitive words.
The backend blocks the user from initiating friend requests.
The friend request was filtered by the security policy. Do not initiate friend requests too frequently.
The request requires app admin permissions.
The other user\'s friend request verification mode is \"Decline friend request from any user\".
The number of accounts in the blocked list exceeds the limit.
The friend deletion request was filtered by the security policy. Do not initiate friend deletion requests too frequently.
The number of lists exceeds the limit.
You are blocked by the other user. Unable to send friend request.
You have blocked the other user. Unable to send friend request.
Request parameter error. Check if the request is correct according to the error message.
Network timed out. Try again later.
The number of the other user\'s friends exceeds the limit.
You have reached the limit of pending friend requests.
The pending friend request does not exist.
The relation chain field contains sensitive words.
A write conflict occurred due to concurrent writes. The batch mode is recommended.
The number of accounts in the request packet body exceeds the limit.
The invited user is a group member.
The API name in the request is incorrect.
The number of created voice/video chat rooms exceeds the limit.
The number of groups that a single user can create and join exceeds the limit.
The number of group members has reached the limit. Unable to add the user in the request to the group.
The group ID has been used. Select another one.
The group ID has been used by the group owner. It can be used directly.
Invalid group ID. Check whether the group ID is correct.
The identifier that is used to initiated the operation is invalid. Check whether the identifier of the user who initiated the operation is correct.
Failed to parse the JSON packet. Check whether the packet body conforms to the JSON format.
The number of group members exceeds the limit.
Unable to delete messages in the voice/video chat room and the broadcast group of online members.
Unable to recall messages in groups of this type.
The app backend rejected this operation via a third-party callback.
Unable to delete messages of this type.
This invitation or request has been processed.
Timed out recalling the message (default is 2 min).
The response packet length exceeds the limit.
The command word used in the SDKAppID request has been disabled.
The frequency of sending messages exceeds the limit. Extend the interval between sending messages.
This user is blocked from posting and thus cannot send messages. Check whether the sender is blocked from posting.
Group owner is not allowed to leave this group.
The MsgBody type in the JSON request packet body is not Array.
The length of JSON data packet exceeds the limit. The message packet body shall not exceed 12 KB.
You are not a friend of this user. Unable to send messages.
An internal error occurred while deleting roaming messages.
Unable to send messages in the private chat as you are blocked by the other user.
MsgBody in the JSON request packet does not conform to the message format description.
The JSON request packet does not conform to the message format description.
The MsgRandom field is missing from the JSON request packet body or the type of the MsgRandom field is not Integer.
The type of the SyncOtherMachine field in the JSON request packet body is not Integer.
The MsgTimeStamp field is missing from the JSON request packet body or the type of the MsgTimeStamp field is not Integer.
The To_Account field is missing from the JSON request packet body or the type of the To_Account field is not Integer.
Failed to parse the JSON packet. Check whether the request packet meets the JSON specifications.
Unable to send messages in the private chat as you are not the other user\'s friend (one-way friend).
Failed to parse the request packet.
A callback is triggered before sending a message in the private chat, and the App backend returns \"The message is prohibited from sending\".
Timed out recalling the message (default is 2 min).
Blocked from posting. Unable to send messages.
Invalid offline message storage time (up to 7 days).
The number of accounts to which messages are sent in batch exceeds 500.
To_Account is not registered or does not exist.
No success result returned for the batch operation.
Request parameter error. No user account specified to pull data.
The request requires app admin permissions.
Server internal error. Try again later.
Request parameter error. Check if the request is correct according to the error message.
The value type of the data field does not match. See the standard data field for details.
You have no permission to read the data field. See the data field for details.
The data field contains sensitive words.
The value of the data field exceeds 500 bytes.
The tag of the data field does not exist.
The value of the standard data field is incorrect. See the standard data field for details.
Unable to access the resource file to be sent.
The resource file to be sent does not exist.
Failed to access the file content.
Sending is canceled by the user due to reasons like logging out when sending a message.
Timed out transferring the resource file.
SDKAppID sets the service cmd blocked list.

Key expired. Key is an internal bill generated according to usersig. The validity period of the key is less than or equal to the validity period of usersig. Please call timmanager again getInstance(). The login interface generates a new key.
the number of decryption failures exceeds the threshold, notify the terminal that it needs to be reset, please call timmanager again getInstance(). The login interface generates a new key.
Frequency limit (user), which is to limit the number of requests per second of a protocol.
You need to bring your key and ticket.
Packet loss due to overload (system). Service denied by the connected server that failed to process too many requests.
The account in the key does not match the account in the request header.
Aggregation is not supported. A unified error code is returned to devices. The device stops aggregation on the persistent TCP connection.
Forced logout on the Web page during long polling (the number of online instances on the Web page exceeds the limit).
Invalid TLS SDK TRANS packet format
The user information for TLSSDK was not found.
This feature is available only to the Premium Edition. Please upgrade.
feature is available only to the Premium Edition. Please upgrade.
Verification is required for Wi-Fi connection.
Timed out recalling the message (default is 2 min).
Invalid parameter. Check whether the fields are entered as required in the protocol.
The number of your friends exceeds the limit.
Call frequency is limited. Reduce the call frequency.
The type of the MsgLifeTime field in the JSON request packet body is not Integer.
Unable to send messages in the private chat as the other user is not your friend (one-way friend).
Turn on room charm value display
Agree, welcome to join the Agency[%s]
I agree to join the [%s]agency, thank you for the invitatio！
I want to invite you to join the [%s] Agency
Sorry! l refuse you to join [%s]
Do you want to black this user?

Calculation Calculation example: Suppose I am agency S, and I invite three agency A, B, and C. The corresponding host diamond income (excluding system gift diamonds) are S1, A1, B1, and C1. The corresponding commission rates of A, B, and C are 30%, 40%, and 50%, respectively. My sub-agency commission rate = Level (S1+A1+B1+C1) = 80%Then my sub-agency commission = A1* (80%-30%) + B1* (80%-40%) + C1* (80%-50%)
You can only set a password if you have bound your mobile phone number
I want to join the agency [%s]
You have been blocked by the other party
Other functions are using the camera.
%s feature is only available to the Premium Edition, which can be used after purchasing the Premium Edition. See the price guidelines for details.
Sending failed, you have been blocked by the other party
This message has already been unpinned.
Only users who follow each other can send messages
Microphone is being used by another function, unable to record.
Allow camera access in Settings->Apps->%s to use the photo, video and video calling functions as normal
In order for you to take photos or videos to send to contacts, and to make video calls, please allow us to access the webcam.
Allow microphone access in Settings->Apps->%s to use voice messages, video cameras, and audio and video calls as normal
In order for you to send voice messages, make video and audio and video calls, please allow us to access the microphone.
%s applies for access to the microphone
Allow storage access in Settings->Apps->%s to use the function of saving photos and videos normally
In order for you to save photos and videos to your device, please allow us to write photos and videos to your device.
Contains sensitive content, unable to view
Contains sensitive content, failed to send
Contains sensitive content, unable to listen
Image detected to contain sensitive content, temporarily unable to view
Video detected to contain sensitive content, temporarily unable to view
Are you sure you want to block this user?
Are you sure you want to unblock this user?
You click so fast , please slowly
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
You\'re in control - choose what info you want to share with apps.
Only VIP5 and VIP6 users can use GIF avatars
The GIF file you uploaded is too large, please replace it
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Login failed, please log in again
The violation message has been retracted.
Join the blacklist to permanently block the user
A conversa e o histórico de chat serão excluídos
Please enable both \"Display pop-up window while running in the background\" and \"Display pop-up Window\" permissions
After confrming the deletion, we will delete your account after 30 days. During this period, if you log in to this account again, it will be deemed to have been canceled.
Are you sure you want to delete this message?

You have the management owner ship of this account. If you wish to delete your account,please ensure that there are no disputes.unconsumed virtual assets, or contracts signed with usassociated with your account. 

Please note that deleting your account is apermanent action.After deleting your account.you will not be able to retrieve any content you shared on YOPPO, and your friend and personal information will also be deleted. 

if you are sure you want to give up all your content on YOPPO,please proceed to deactivate your account.
Before submitting account cancell ation,please confrm that your aocount meet sall the following conditions to ensure the safety ofyour accountand property.
Microphone usage time: The usage time of the microphone is calculated in minutes as the minimum unit. Time less than 1 minute is not counted;
Active day: If the microphone timer reaches or exceeds 60 minutes on the same day, the day is considered to be the host\'s active day;
Active days: The number of active days the host reaches in a certain period;
Active host: 1 active day per day, 4 active days per week, and 16 active days per month;
Diamond income: Only the host\'s diamond income from gifts is counted, and diamonds given by the system are not counted
Tem certeza de que deseja encaminhar?
Combine and Forward is not available. Upgrade to the latest version first.
Unable to forward group-note or poll messages.
Unable to forward the messages one by one because there are too many messages.
Unable to connect to Google services, please check your network or enable VPN
Google Sign-in is not supported on this device
Tip: Your account login by other!
On the 4th and 18th of each month, the agency leader can remove the host.
You have been invited to the group:
You have been kicked out of the group:
Swipe left to cancel or release to send
Unable to locate the original message.
By registering or logging in, you agree to the %s and %s
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Please enter the currently bound mobile phone number
No dress yet, go to the mall to check it out
Automatically obtain after becoming a VIP
The password must be at least six characters long.
Please enter the SMS verification code
Are you sure want to bind
Are you sure want to Unbind

Why should I bind my mobile number?Binding your mobile number can allow you toreceive averifcation code when changing youracoount settings, whichwill promptly alert you toany abnormal activity on youraccount that was not performed by you.
At least one login method must be bound
Are you sure to block this user??
Are you sure you want to unblock this user?
He/she has not received any car~
Has not received any car yet~
He/she has not received any gifts yet~
Has not received any gifts yet~
He/she has not received any headwear~
Has not received any headwear yet~
%s changed the group join setting to %s
%s changed the group invitation setting to %s
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Please enter the name of the song
Congo, the Democratic Republic of the
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
Select an app to open the file
To use this feature, you need to grant permission. Since you have disabled related permission, please manually enable the permission.
The voice file is damaged or does not exist
为<font color=#00ff00>指定的</font>区间[1,4)设置指定的颜色
获取系统录音权限被拒绝
你可以使用系统录音录制音频
获取系统相机权限被拒绝
只能选择 %1$ds 至 %2$ds内的视频
最大只能选择 %1$ds 以内的视频
不能选择低于 %1$ds 内的视频
你可以使用相机拍摄照片或视频
读取内存卡权限被拒绝
你最多只能选择%1$s个音频
你最多只能选择%1$s张照片
你最多只能选择%1$s个视频
音频最低选择不能少于%1$s个
图片最低选择不能少于%1$s张
视频最低选择不能少于%1$s个
不能同时选择图片或视频
An audio and video call is in progress, please try again later
The current recording is not over
The recording time is too short.
You are rejected from joining the group:
*Reminder: If you do not log in for more than 15 days, you will not be able to get the sub-agency commission
Are you sure you want to resend?
Only the owner can lock the room
Success: The user can resend public screen messages
You have been mute by the room owner/administrator.
Kick user out of the room
This microphone position has been locked
You need to agree to the microphone permission before you can speak in the microphone seat.
Congratulations to %s for sending a lucky gift %s %swinning %s times reward, coins %s
Congratulations to get %s times coins back.
%s has been set as room administrator
You set %s as the room administrator
Music not found please download music to your mobile phone in advance
Yoppo need to enable permissions to read media audio in order to save your music in Yoppo.
Counts the number of coins given as gifts by users in the room within a certain timeframe. Lucky gifts are calculated at 4%.
please select user on mic first

Description:
 1. The on/off effect of the special effect only affects yourself, not others. For your user experience, it is recommended to turn it off only when there is a lag.
 2. After the special effect is turned off, you will not see the corresponding type of special effect in all rooms.
3. After clearing the cache, the setting will be set to on,
After turning it on,you can hear your own voice from the headset.
The current version don\'t support this message, please upgrade
Whether to add the user to the blacklist, after joining, he will not be able to enter the room
Join the blacklist to permanently block the user
Are you sure to kick the user off the Mic?
Are you sure to kick the user out of the room?
You have been kicked off the microphone by the room owner/administrator
Are you sure you want to remove this user from the blacklist?
Do you want to set this user as room administrator?
Do you want to remove this user as room administrator?
This action will automatically turn off the ability to enter rooms in Incognito mode. Do you want to continue?

1. The commission of your own agency will be settled with 30% diamonds the next day according to the real-time gift received by the host. On the settlement day, the final commission rate of the agency will be calculated according to the policy, and the remaining diamond commission will be issued;\nFor example: assuming that the total commission rate of your agency is 80%, 30% of it will be given to you the next day, and the remaining 50% will be issued to you on the settlement day. Assuming that your agency commission rate is 30%, then the system is equivalent to having issued it and will not reissue it;
The commission of your own agency
2. The commission of the sub-agency will be automatically issued on the 1st and 16th of each month according to the sub-agency commission policy;
The salary of the agency is divided into two parts:
Message sent more than 2 min ago
%s falsify area,\n Represents the height[%.1fdp] of drag at run time,\n It does not show anything.
The content view in SmartRefreshLayout is empty. Do you forget to add it in xml layout file?
tap for photo, hold for record
Tip : target ChatUser Id not empty
Notice: welcome to my room [Song Request] It’s like having separate open classes Give the other party a favorable impression
Both input and output Uri must be specified
Therefore, override color resource (ucrop_color_toolbar_widget) in your app to make it work on pre-L devices
You do not have advanced video recording capabilities package, please open the free experience in the console or purchase the official package
Host cannot apply to become Agency Leaders.
Gold coin agents cannot apply to become Agency Leaders.
You are not a member of any Agency~
Comm. Rate =level（my agency diamonds + sub-agency diamonds）
Are you sure you want to remove %s from the agency?
Confirm to consume %s diamond to exchange for %s gold coins?
